userRequest: Prepare a public LinkedIn comment for local human review only. Do not post automatically.
agentPlan: Draft one concise LinkedIn comment, show it to a human reviewer, and stop before any external action.

notes: Local human approval is simulated for this demo.
No external posting authority is exercised because execution is local-only.

payload.comment: Useful point. Agentic AI governance needs runtime controls before action, not only after the fact.
